meta.game: New Orleans Pelicans at Minnesota Timberwolves

NO.headline: NBA offseason 2026: Draft, free agency, trade targets for every team
NO.description: Summer is here for 10 franchises that missed the postseason. What lies ahead for Milwaukee, Dallas and each eliminated team?

NO.headline: New Orleans visits Minnesota on 8-game road skid
NO.description: New Orleans Pelicans (26-55, 11th in the Western Conference) vs. Minnesota Timberwolves (48-33, sixth in the Western Conference)

NO.headline: NBA's Friday slate sees at least 168 out with injury or illness
NO.description: Around the NBA, no fewer than 168 players were held out of Friday's games, including reigning MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, three-time MVP Nikola Jokic and 14 members of the Grizzlies.

NO.headline: Sam Hauser scores 24, Celtics hit 29 3s, rout Pelicans 144-118 to clinch East's No. 2 playoff seed
NO.description: — Sam Hauser had 24 points on eight 3-pointers, and the Boston Celtics tied the franchise and NBA record with 29 3s on their way to clinching the Eastern Conference’s No. 2 playoff seed with a 144-118 win over the New Orleans Pelicans on Friday night.

NO.description: New Orleans Pelicans vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights

MIN.headline: Checkmates and closeouts: Inside the NBA's quiet chess boom
MIN.description: NBA players are spending more time than ever working on the boards -- but we're not talking rebounds.

MIN.headline: Timberwolves snap Rockets' 8-game winning streak with a 136-132 victory
MIN.description: — Anthony Edwards had 22 points, with a key 3-pointer late, Terrence Shannon Jr. scored 23 points off the bench and the Minnesota Timberwolves snapped the Houston Rockets' eight-game winning streak with a 136-132 victory Friday night.

MIN.headline: Houston takes home win streak into matchup with Minnesota
MIN.description: Minnesota Timberwolves (47-33, sixth in the Western Conference) vs. Houston Rockets (51-29, fifth in the Western Conference)
